case_title: GILBERTO FAUSTO FLORES VS. MARIA CATALINA LOMELI

docket_entries.description: SC-150 FORM USED FOR RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, GILBERTO FAUSTO AS TO DEFENDANT LOMELI, MARIA CATALINA
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-14-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-25-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JOSE LARA, SWORN IN AS SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FLORES, GILBERTO FAUSTO AS TO DEFENDANT LOMELI, MARIA CATALINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOMELI, MARIA CATALINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, GILBERTO FAUSTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOMELI, MARIA CATALINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOMELI, MARIA CATALINA
